hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && deno run --allow-read --allow-run=git scripts/agent-workflow-hook.mjs session-start
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && deno run --allow-read --allow-run=git scripts/agent-workflow-hook.mjs user-prompt-submit
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && deno run --allow-read --allow-run=git scripts/agent-workflow-hook.mjs pre-tool-use
cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && deno run --allow-read --allow-run=git scripts/agent-workflow-hook.mjs stop
